CanDoStatement: I can say three family words
HomeActivity: Point to family photos and say the Malayalam words

CanDoStatement: I can say three food words
I can say hello and thank you
HomeActivity: Call a relative and say one greeting

CanDoStatement: I can use ithu and athu
I can say what I want
I can ask what and where
I can read five short words
I can choose nee or ningal
I can use enikku and ningalkku
I can say present past and future
I can answer questions from a passage
HomeActivity: Read and answer in a notebook

CanDoStatement: I can record a one-minute Malayalam voice note
HomeActivity: Send a practice note to family
